Package neqsim.process.safety.inventory

Class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegmentResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.inventory.TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegmentResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
TrappedInventoryCalculator
public static class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegmentResult extends Object implements Serializable
Per-segment inventory calculation result.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventorySegmentResult

      private InventorySegmentResult(TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegment segment, double gasVolumeM3, double liquidVolumeM3, double gasMassKg, double liquidMassKg, double gasDensityKgPerM3, double liquidDensityKgPerM3)
      Creates a segment result.
      Parameters:
      segment - source segment
      gasVolumeM3 - gas-filled volume in m3
      liquidVolumeM3 - liquid-filled volume in m3
      gasMassKg - gas mass in kg
      liquidMassKg - liquid mass in kg
      gasDensityKgPerM3 - gas density in kg/m3
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - liquid density in kg/m3

      Gets the segment identifier.

      segment identifier

      Gets total segment volume.
